derivation_source: Blocked release-candidate record for the tracked curated reader manuscript at source commit 5dc1cd467543edc97b1517901529347a6ef40052. The artifacts named here are ignored local review outputs from `python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf`, not approved release artifacts.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; node scripts/validate_reader_html_artifact_browser.js --strict --site build/curated_reader_edition/format_artifacts/html/_reader_site --manifest build/curated_reader_edition/reader_manifest.json --report build/curated_reader_edition/curated_reader_html_browser_report.json
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered local curated reader HTML review tree with 49 pages and 98 of 98 browser page-view pairs passing, including 20 of 20 key-figure page-view pairs. Tracked review digest is 4d6851d11bcb1097925956c216937ebb65e1b51af9174009d0488b0eb36d955a. Blocked: this is not release-approved, not published, and not the generated-reader HTML artifact approved by the 2026-06-29 record.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; python3 scripts/inspect_curated_reader_format_artifacts.py
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered and structurally inspected local EPUB review artifact: 8,663,801 bytes, SHA-256 9b03601a6023392d52bfa594cf1f4e6c20bd6e9d79bac62d362f30ad58938157, 52 XHTML entries, 62 image entries, OPF title The ASI Stack, creator Corben Sorenson, and language en-US. The repaired EPUB package audit records SHA-256 2e15e9f20bebd4816ae10081e2faff69314686d659c62c85c2c93ef23e70aca9, 52 XHTML entries checked, 49 packaged content XHTML entries checked, 0 unresolved internal hrefs, 104 browser page-view pairs, 0 browser failures, and 10 matched key-figure SVG titles. The EPUB key-figure layout review records 10 key-figure XHTML entries, 20 key-figure page-view pairs, 0 key-figure browser failures, 5476 minimum body text characters, 23 minimum alt-text words, 10 px maximum horizontal overflow, and 0 image failures. Blocked: dedicated e-reader approval or an explicit release decision accepting the Chromium XHTML review has not happened, and this EPUB is not release-approved.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; python3 scripts/inspect_curated_reader_format_artifacts.py
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered and structurally inspected local DOCX review artifact: 8,321,124 bytes, SHA-256 99f9bf48050c2a34244e98fb43e35ee35c377db207fd79d891c3385e11337bc6, 77 zip entries, 61 PNG media entries, 0 SVG media entries, and 17,354 paragraph markers. The repaired DOCX package audit records SHA-256 1690f5b3bf63781e9dd819a7c66f1724043d74eee4d2132fa48e6597d4e5d7c1, 17,354 paragraphs, 286 relationships, 0 raw .qmd relationship targets, 0 unresolved internal relationship targets, and 10 matched key-figure stems. The LibreOffice headless Writer review converted the repaired DOCX to a 503-page PDF, checked 1,025,566 text characters, raster-checked 503 converted pages, and found 0 blank, 0 low-ink, and 0 near-edge converted-page rasters. The DOCX key-figure layout review records 10 key-figure title pages, 10 rastered key-figure pages, 72.1 pt minimum title margin, 9.53% minimum page ink, 0.0% maximum near-edge ink, and 37.95 minimum luminance standard deviation. Blocked: Word, LibreOffice GUI, or Google Docs application-level review has not happened and this DOCX is not release-approved.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_curated_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx --include-pdf; python3 scripts/inspect_curated_reader_format_artifacts.py; python3 scripts/audit_curated_reader_pdf_layout.py
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered and structurally inspected local PDF review artifact: 5,892,357 bytes, SHA-256 7c120d9e8ef4b595e46d52434c80d7ec72135ef11472e908133db76ed606317d, 504 pages, title The ASI Stack, author Corben Sorenson, unencrypted letter pages, 50 Chrome-screenshot Mermaid fallbacks, and an all-page text/bounding-box probe with 169,766 word boxes and 0 out-of-bounds word boxes. The all-page raster probe records 504 rendered pages, 0 blank pages, 0 low-ink pages, 0 near-edge pages, and 10 matched key-figure captions. The extracted-text reading-flow review records 504 nonempty text pages, 44 ordered chapter headings, 3 ordered appendix headings, and 0 replacement characters. The PDF key-figure layout review records 10 key-figure caption pages, 10 rastered key-figure pages, 165.878 pt minimum caption margin, 3.36% minimum page ink, 0.0% maximum near-edge ink, and 14.2 minimum luminance standard deviation. Blocked: this is not manual PDF page-by-page reading-flow review, not PDF viewer approval, and the PDF is not release-approved.
Blocked: EPUB has not been opened and inspected in a real e-reader or application review path, so e-reader approval remains absent.

Blocked: no MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB artifact exists; the current audio-script probe is a preparation workspace only. The automated audio-script reading-flow review checks 49 scripts, 49 ordered markers, 66 narration notes, and 1,067,718 text characters in book order, but it is not narration quality review, not pronunciation review, not chapter timecoding, not audio generation, and not audio release approval.

format_probe_closure.release_boundary: The automated package, link, text, raster, automated PNG raster, PDF Mermaid fallback, key-figure, EPUB key-figure layout, PDF key-figure layout, DOCX key-figure layout, browser, source-geometry, source-level visual identity, source-level accessibility/navigation, and audio-script reading-flow probes support release preparation only; they do not approve EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, audio, final figure art, or the curated reader edition.

review_status.notes: Curated reader chapter-level reconciliation, local HTML browser viability, repaired EPUB package/content navigation, Chromium EPUB XHTML browser review, EPUB key-figure layout review, repaired DOCX relationship integrity, LibreOffice headless DOCX conversion/raster review, DOCX key-figure layout review, PDF-safe Mermaid fallback rendering, all-page PDF text/bounding-box extraction, all-page low-resolution PDF raster smoke testing, PDF extracted-text reading-flow review, PDF key-figure layout review, audio-script reading-flow review, key-figure package/text survival, source-geometry review, source-level visual identity review, source-level accessibility/navigation review, and automated PNG raster review are recorded. Release-quality continuity, dedicated e-reader approval or explicit release decision, Word/LibreOffice GUI/Google Docs DOCX review or explicit release decision, final figure-artifact review, manual aesthetic review, visual identity approval, keyboard-only review, screen-reader review, WCAG conformance review, and audio review remain open. This record intentionally preserves blockers rather than approving artifacts.

reader_manuscript.review_notes: The tracked curated reader manuscript has 44 reconciled chapter records and no missing curated chapter files, but all chapter records still preserve release blockers until final format review and a future approval record explicitly clear them.

audio_package.review_notes: The audio-script workspace is generated for review only and now has an automated reading-flow/order review. No narration-quality approval, pronunciation approval, chapter timing, audio files, MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB package exists or is approved.

companion_material.review_notes: Companion notes exist for dense figure/e-reader/audio support, but they are not released as standalone artifacts and do not replace meaning-critical prose.

human_consumption_gate.notes: The curated reader manuscript is a concrete human-reader candidate with rendered local artifacts, PDF-safe Mermaid fallbacks, automated package/text/raster/key-figure probes, a Chromium EPUB XHTML browser review, an EPUB key-figure layout review recording 10 key-figure XHTML entries, 20 key-figure page-view pairs, 0 key-figure browser failures, 5476 minimum body text characters, 23 minimum alt-text words, 10 px maximum horizontal overflow, and 0 image failures, a LibreOffice headless DOCX conversion/raster review, a DOCX key-figure layout review recording 10 key-figure title pages, 10 rastered key-figure pages, 72.1 pt minimum title margin, 9.53% minimum page ink, 0.0% maximum near-edge ink, and 37.95 minimum luminance standard deviation, a PDF extracted-text reading-flow review, a PDF key-figure layout review recording 10 key-figure caption pages, 10 rastered key-figure pages, 165.878 pt minimum caption margin, 3.36% minimum page ink, 0.0% maximum near-edge ink, and 14.2 minimum luminance standard deviation, an audio-script reading-flow review, a source-geometry review recording 10 content-bound checks, 10 text-anchor checks, and 22.0 px minimum content edge margin, a source-level visual identity review recording 54 combined colors, 5 non-neutral color families, and 10 key figures, a source-level accessibility/navigation review recording 44 one-H1 chapters, 44 handoff sections, 10 draft figure alt texts, 10 figure boundary paragraphs, 0 live-marker leaks, and 0 raw core-claim marker leaks, and an automated PNG raster review recording 10 generated raster fallbacks, 10 standard 1200 x 760 canvases, 99.954% minimum opaque pixel coverage, 27.64 minimum luminance standard deviation, and 116 minimum quantized colors, but it is not yet a release. Dedicated EPUB e-reader approval or explicit release decision, Word/LibreOffice GUI/Google Docs DOCX review or explicit release decision, manual PDF page-by-page reading-flow or explicit release decision, manual aesthetic review, final figure-artifact review, manual visual identity approval, keyboard-only review, screen-reader review, WCAG conformance review, and audio review gates remain open.

audiobook_gate.notes: Audio remains downstream of the reviewed reader edition. The generated script has automated reading-flow/order review only; no narration-quality review, chapter timecoding, audio artifact, MP3, M4B, audio-embedded EPUB, or audio release approval exists.

release_notes: Blocked curated reader release-candidate record. It records exact current local HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, and audio blocker state for the tracked curated reader manuscript. It does not approve, publish, archive, or tag any curated reader artifact.
residuals: curated_reconciliation_not_approved remains active on all 44 curated chapter records until a future approval record clears it.
format_artifact_not_reviewed remains active on all 44 curated chapter records until exact format review is complete.
reader_release_record_not_created remains active for approved curated reader artifacts; this record is explicitly blocked and partial.
full_format_artifact_review_not_completed remains active for EPUB, DOCX, and PDF.
app_or_ereader_review_not_completed remains active for EPUB and e-reader paths because the Chromium XHTML review is not dedicated e-reader approval or release approval.
full_pdf_layout_review_not_completed remains active because the all-page bounding-box audit is not manual page-by-page reading-flow review.

Source-geometry review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks SVG viewBox, visible source bounds, text anchors, entity counts, and draft/non-release status, but it does not clear raster review, manual aesthetic review, final figure-artifact review, e-reader review, DOCX/PDF application review, visual identity approval, or release approval.

Source-level visual identity review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks stylesheet tokens, source SVG accessibility metadata, palette diversity, and carried contrast metrics, but it does not clear final figure-artifact review, manual aesthetic review, e-reader review, DOCX/PDF application review, visual identity approval, or release approval.

Source-level accessibility/navigation review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks tracked reader source headings, one-H1 chapter shape, handoff sections, draft figure alt texts, figure boundary paragraphs, live-scaffold leakage, raw claim-marker leakage, and release-blocker preservation, but it does not clear keyboard-only review, screen-reader review, WCAG conformance, e-reader review, audiobook review, or release approval.

Automated PNG raster review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks generated fallback dimensions, nonblank luminance variation, color diversity, opaque coverage, and per-artifact digests, but it does not clear manual aesthetic review, e-reader visual review, DOCX/PDF application review, final figure-artifact review, visual identity approval, or release approval.

EPUB key-figure layout review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 10 key-figure XHTML entries, 20 key-figure page-view pairs, 0 key-figure browser failures, 10 px maximum horizontal overflow, 0 image failures, figure boundaries, release boundaries, alt text, and body-text presence, but it does not clear dedicated e-reader device review, does not clear e-reader application approval, final figure-artifact review, visual identity approval, or release approval.

PDF key-figure layout review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 10 key-figure caption pages, caption-page raster dimensions, 165.878 pt minimum caption margin, page ink, near-edge ink absence, and luminance variation, but it does not clear manual page-by-page PDF review, does not clear PDF viewer review, does not clear final figure-artifact review, visual identity approval, or release approval.

DOCX key-figure layout review is recorded as preparation evidence only; it checks 10 key-figure title pages in the LibreOffice-converted DOCX PDF, title-page raster dimensions, 72.1 pt minimum title margin, page ink, near-edge ink absence, and luminance variation, but it does not clear Word review, does not clear LibreOffice GUI review, does not clear Google Docs review, does not clear manual document review, final figure-artifact review, visual identity approval, or release approval.
Final figure-artifact review, visual identity approval, e-reader inspection, audio narration review, audio file generation, and audio-embedded EPUB packaging remain incomplete.
